/opt/software-current/2023.06/x86_64/intel/skylake_avx512/software/GCCcore/13.2.0/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libgmock.so -o ../../../lib/libgmock.so "CMakeFiles/gmock.dir/src/gmock-all.cc.o"   -L/mnt/ffs24/home/fuyao3/ROOT_6_30_02/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/mnt/ffs24/home/fuyao3/ROOT_6_30_02/lib:/mnt/home/fuyao3/pku_resbos/SourceCode/resbos2/build/lib: ../../../lib/libgtest.so
